page_metadata.biotools__summary: OPUS-SSRI (Sparsity and Smoothness Regularized Imaging) is a stand-alone computer program for Maximum A Posteriori refinement of (multiple) 3D reconstructions in cryo-electron microscopy.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: OPUS-SSRI (Sparsity and Smoothness Regularized Imaging) is a stand-alone computer program for Maximum A Posteriori refinement of (multiple) 3D reconstructions in cryo-electron microscopy.
